Clem..Bladder: Constant urging to urinate, most painful tenesmus. Flow stopping and starting. The urethra is painful to pressure. Micturition is remarkably slow, only a feeble stream because of the smallness of the urethra.
Clem..Chest: Scirrhus of the breast with induration and ulceration. Scirrhus of the left mamma with stitches in the shoulder;
Clem..Generalities: It has pain on lying down and preparatory to going to sleep. An electric shock; twitching, jerking, as if a faradic battery had been turned on. It has also a general febrile condition, but nothing very striking.
Clem..Head: On the outer head we have a part of the manifestations of Clematis vesicular eruptions with great itching, stinging and crawling.
Clem..Skin: It has vesicular eruptions almost erysipelatous in character. Vesicular eruptions filling with yellow fluid and with induration under the vesicles. It produces eruptions very closely related to herpes and eczema, and they spread.
Clem..Bladder, urination: Inability to evacuate all the urine at once. When beginning to urinate it burns the worst, while urinating it sticks in urethra, and after urinating it still continues to burn.
Clem..Generalities, side: While it has both sides, strange to say there is more trouble in the glands that are on the right side of the body than on the left. Strange to say, the right side of the body is more commonly affected than the left.
Clem..Clinical: It is seldom indicated in the very first stage of gonorrhoea during the highest inflammation, but in those cases that are inclined to hang on. Then come the sequelae if gonorrhea be suppressed. Inflammation of the testes is common, and this is one of the medicines suitable.
Clem..Abdomen: Swelling of the glands of the groin is a striking feature even when connected with scirrhus. It is connected also with suppressed gonorrhea, and with rheumatism of the joints.
Clem..Eye: Burning, and smarting of the eyes; worse from closing them. Inflammation of the iris. Eyes inflamed, protruded, dim.
Clem..Genitalia male: Pain and swelling of the right spermatic cord; this is worse at night, worse from walking and from the warmth of the bed. Pain in the testes, drawing. Painful, inflamed and swollen testes. Orchitis with much painful swelling and hardness.
Clem..Urine: Discharge from the urethra of thick pus. Intermittent flow of the urine. Urine stops and starts with the chordee still present.
Clem..Bladder, urination, involuntary: He always feels as if there was a little more, and when he appears to have finished it will keep dribbling away.
Clem..Eye, inflammation: Burning, and smarting of the eyes; worse from closing them. Inflammation of the iris. Eyes inflamed, protruded, dim.
Clem..Eye, inflammation, conjunctiva: About the eyes we have vesicular eruptions. If seen in one stage it will be vesicular, and if later, it will be seen as an ulceration.
Clem..Head, eruption: On the outer head we have a part of the manifestations of Clematis vesicular eruptions with great itching, stinging and crawling.
Clem..Head, eruption, crusts, scabs: On the outer head we have a part of the manifestations of Clematis vesicular eruptions with great itching, stinging and crawling. Now what is true of the eruption here will be true of the Clematis eruption everywhere. It is aggravated from washing.
Clem..Skin, eruptions: Eruption of vesicles and pustules from the former exuded a clear, watery secretion, from the latter a purulent fluid. Yellow vesicles and yellow pustules. Both are common to this remedy. Dark, burning eruptions with violent itching.
Clem..Skin, eruptions, herpetic: Vesicular eruptions on the body. Herpetic eruptions here and there it has a herpetic constitution. Herpes that ulcerate. Ichorous, spreading ulcers. Simple and graver forms of herpes. Herpes zoster about the body.
Clem..Teeth: Stitching and drawing pains in the teeth; worse at night; better for a short time from holding cold water in the mouth; better from drawing in cold air; worse from the warmth of the bed. The toothache is tolerable during the day, but as soon as he lies down in bed and assumes a horizontal position it increases to an intolerable degree.
Clem..Clinical, inflammation: Inflammation of the testes is common, and this is one of the medicines suitable. It is the nature of this remedy to infiltrate and inflame tissues, and, hence it is useful in those cases of gonorrhoea where they have been slow in passing away.
